info.title: E-School API v2
info.description: API documentation for E-School v2 endpoints

BearerAuth.name: Authorization
BearerAuth.description: Enter JWT token with Bearer prefix

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token along with role-based data.

message.example: The email or password that you've entered is incorrect.

get.description: Authenticate user during API call and return role-based data back to client.
Authenticate user during API call and return role-based data back to client.

patch.description: Detailed description of what this API does
Detailed description of what this API does

post.description: Detailed description of what this API does

patch.description: Detailed description of what this API does

post.description: Detailed description of what this API does
Detailed description of what this API does

patch.description: Detailed description of what this API does

get.description: Fetch paginated list of user roles along with distinct user types.

get.summary: Get user roles list for school-employee roles
get.description: Fetch paginated user roles filtered by:  - userType = parent OR student  - OR userType starting with "school-"

post.description: Creates a new user role with name, key, and user type. Note: The `data` field in response is encrypted.

patch.description: Updates an existing user role by ID. Maps actionIds (keys) to ObjectIds and updates role details.

400.description: Duplicate user role name or key

patch.description: Updates the status of a user role to either active or inactive.

message.example: User Role status changed to active successfully.

get.summary: Get action menu for user roles
get.description: Fetches the structured action menu used for assigning permissions to user roles. The menu is grouped by subsystem → module → submodule → actions.  Note: The data field is encrypted.

get.summary: Get action keys by user role ID
get.description: Fetches all action keys assigned to a specific user role using its ID. Returns encrypted data.
Fetches fee plan details for a student or temporary admission based on id, gradeId, and batchYear. Includes payment status per component and currency conversion.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Student ID / Temporary Admission ID / FeePlan ID

message.example: Please Provide Valid Id, grade and batch year

patch.description: Updates an existing student fee plan.   Rules:  - Only one feesPlan object is allowed  - Duplicate fee components are not allowed  - Paid fee components cannot be removed or modified  - Discount cannot exceed paid amount constraints  - Automatically handles zero-value components (marks as paid)   Uses transaction to ensure atomic updates.

message.example: Duplicate fees component / Invalid data / Paid component constraint

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of temporary admissions with role-based and dynamic filters.  - Default filters: admissionStatus = "temporary", studentStatus = "active".  - Role-based access:  • Employees: restricted to their own counsellor records.  • Admins: can filter by counsellor via query param.  - Supports filters: admissionDate (range), studentFirstName, studentLastName,  boardId, gradeId, userStatus, and initialPaymentDueDate (overdue pending payments).  - Populates counsellor, board, and grade details.  - Returns paginated results with total count.
Fetches paginated fee structures with optional filters like boardId, gradeId, and currency. Also includes currency exchange rate mapping.
Fetches a single temporary admission record using ID (either TemporaryAdmission ID or Student ID). Returns encrypted data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Temporary Admission ID or Student ID

post.description: Creates a new temporary admission along with:  - Parent (if not exists)  - Student documents  - Communication form  - Fees plan  - Sends email notification  Note: Entire request body must be sent inside "admission" and "feesDetails".

message.example: Temporary Admission Successfully Created And Email Sent
Parent Email Already Exist with different usertype

get.summary: Export temporary admissions list as Excel
get.description: Fetches filtered temporary admissions and returns an Excel file download.

parameters.name: admissionDate
parameters.description: Filter by admission date (range supported internally)

get.description: Fetches student documents using temporaryAdmissionId or studentId. Document URLs are resolved from storage and returned in encrypted format.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Temporary Admission ID or Student ID

409.description: Invalid ID or document not found

message.example: Please Provide Valid TemporaryAdmission / Student Document doesn't exist

patch.description: Uploads or updates a student document for a given temporary admission or student. Replaces existing file if present and marks document as not-verified.

message.example: Please Provide/Valid temporaryAdmission, document, file OR Document Uploading Failed

get.description: Fetches student communication form using temporaryAdmissionId or studentId. Also returns available subjects based on board and grade.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Temporary Admission ID or Student ID

409.description: Invalid ID or record not found

message.example: Please Provide Valid TemporaryAdmission / Student Communication Record doesn't exist

patch.description: Updates student communication details for a given temporary admission. Only permitted fields are allowed. Cannot update after LMS registration.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Temporary Admission ID or Student ID

409.description: Invalid ID / Not allowed / Validation error

message.example: Please Provide Valid TemporaryAdmission / After LMS registration, update not allowed / Validation error

200_INVALID_KEY.description: Invalid field provided in request body

message.example: Entered Key is not valid fieldName

patch.description: Updates admission status between temporary and confirmed. Requires initial payment done, active student status, and LMS status pending. Rolls back if any update fails.

parameters.name: isTemporary
parameters.description: If true, forces status to confirmed

message.example: Invalid Status or Provide Valid Id
Admission status cannot be updated / initial payment pending / student inactive / LMS already done

patch.description: Toggle student status between active and inactive across TemporaryAdmission, StudentCommunicationForm, and StudentConversionAdmissionDocument. Fails if LMS registration is already completed.

message.example: User status changed to active successfully

200.1.description: User already registered in LMS / cannot update

patch.summary: Change counsellor for a temporary admission
patch.description: Updates the counsellor assigned to a temporary admission record using the provided counsellor ID.

post.description: Creates a new building.   Rules:  - Building name is required  - Building name must be unique

message.example: Building name is required / already exists

get.description: Fetch paginated list of buildings.   Filters:  - status (optional): Filter by building status (active/inactive)   Pagination:  - page (default: 1)

patch.description: Updates the name of an existing building.   Rules:  - Building ID must be valid  - Building name must be unique

message.example: Building with same name already exists.

patch.description: Updates the status of a building (active / inactive).   Rules:  - Building ID must be valid  - buildingStatus is required  - If setting status to 'inactive', building must NOT have any active floors

message.example: Building status is required / Active floors exist
